data.title: 11 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Thursday's Intraday Session
Why Capricor Therapeutics (CAPR) Shares Are Trading Lower
data.description: Capricor Therapeutics shares are trading lower by 2.7% during Thursday's session. The company earlier commenced its public offering of common stock.

data.title: e.l.f. Beauty Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
data.description: Investors often turn to recommendations made by Wall Street analysts before making a Buy, Sell, or Hold decision about a stock. While media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm employed (or sell-side) analysts often affect a stock's price, do they really matter?

data.title: Strong September Retail Sales Put Fed's Next Move In Doubt: Interest Rate Cuts Are 'Not A Slam Dunk'
data.description: September retail sales rise sparks Fed rate cut debate among economists. Sales beat expectations, could complicate November cut outlook.

data.title: Arrest Made In SEC X Account Hack Prior To Bitcoin ETF Approval, FBI Says Phone Used To 'Manipulate Financial Markets'
data.description: The FBI has arrested Eric Council Jr., a 25-year-old Alabama man, in connection with the January 2024 hack of the Security and Exchange Commission’s X account falsely stating Bitcoin ETFs were app
